figures.caption: Fig. 3. S1 baseline tracking: distribution of lateral RMSE on straight (left) vs. high-curvature (right) routes. The widening tail at high curvature is a known Pure Pursuit artifact; rather than masking it via curvaturedependent speed profiling, we expose look-ahead and gains as Pareto variables (Sec. III-C).

Fig. 2. Closed-loop architecture of MORPH-U. Time-windowed synchronization and fusion populate an ego-centric LDM from on-board sensing and V2X (CAM/DENM). Hybrid-A* replans when validated events or knowledge changes trigger replanning. Pareto tuning is performed offline to select planning/control operating points. The acceptance gates (V2X and update path) prevent faulty triggers from reaching the planner.
